_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

tests.assertion: Unauthenticated users cannot access /staff/dashboard or dashboard APIs.
Public role cannot read dashboard data.
Each staff role maps to correct dashboard role view.
Non-admin dashboard KPIs are filtered by assignment scope.
Browser-provided school_id outside assignment scope is rejected.
User cannot load widget without source module permission.
Dashboard drilldown route rechecks target module permission.
Critical alert tile never exposes raw OMR, answer key, provider secrets or private file URLs.
Dashboard cache key contains role/scope/filter hash and expires.
Staff can save only own dashboard preferences unless admin.
Dismissing alert creates dismissal record but source issue remains active.
Every future dashboard bug fix adds regression tests.

acceptance_criteria: Dashboard loads role-aware KPI groups for authenticated staff.
Non-admin data is scoped to assignment.
Critical alerts show safe summaries and authorized drilldowns only.
Daily command center shows due/overdue/blocked operational work.
Public users have zero dashboard access.
